# TheDiscomBill

> Free, browser-based electricity bill calculator for India. Covers 70+ distribution companies (DISCOMs) across all 35 states and union territories with slab-wise (telescopic) energy charges, fixed/demand charges, FPPA fuel surcharge, electricity duty, solar net metering and Time-of-Day billing. Independent — not affiliated with any DISCOM, SERC or government body. Estimates are provisional; official bills come from the DISCOM.

Tariff data is compiled from publicly available tariff orders (FY 2024-25 / 2025-26) and the calculation engine applies each DISCOM's published methodology: telescopic slabs, sanctioned-load-based fixed charges, then surcharges and duty.

## Tools

- [Bill Calculator](https://www.thediscombill.com/): instant provisional electricity bill for any Indian DISCOM with a full slab-wise breakdown
- [Tariff Comparison](https://www.thediscombill.com/compare/): major DISCOMs compared at 200/400/600/1000 units for domestic and commercial
- [Usage Estimator](https://www.thediscombill.com/usage/): estimate monthly kWh from household appliances
- [Rooftop Solar Savings](https://www.thediscombill.com/solar/): system sizing, payback and net-metering savings
- [Bill Check](https://www.thediscombill.com/bill-check/): direct links to every DISCOM's official view/pay-bill portal
- [Bill Review by Experts](https://www.thediscombill.com/bill-review/): upload a bill and have a human expert review it (free account)
- [New Connection](https://www.thediscombill.com/new-connection/): charges, documents and process per DISCOM
- [Complaint](https://www.thediscombill.com/complaint/): DISCOM complaint portals and the 1912 national helpline

## Guides

- [How to Read Your UPPCL Electricity Bill](https://www.thediscombill.com/guides/how-to-read-uppcl-bill/): A line-by-line walkthrough of a UPPCL (MVVNL, PVVNL, DVVNL, PuVVNL, KESCO) electricity bill: account fields, meter readings, energy charges, fixed charges, FPPA, electricity duty and arrears — and how to verify the total yourself
- [Why Did My Electricity Bill Suddenly Increase?](https://www.thediscombill.com/guides/why-did-my-electricity-bill-increase/): The 8 most common reasons an Indian electricity bill jumps — slab escalation, catch-up after estimated readings, FPPA revisions, seasonal AC load, arrears with LPSC, meter faults, excess-load penalties — and exactly how to check each one
- [Time-of-Day (ToD) Electricity Billing Explained](https://www.thediscombill.com/guides/tod-billing-explained/): What Time-of-Day (ToD) electricity billing is, who it applies to in India, how peak and off-peak rates work with smart meters, what kVAh billing means, and practical ways to cut your bill by shifting load

## Tariff reference

- [All states & DISCOMs directory](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/states/): index of every state and DISCOM landing page

- [Andhra Pradesh electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/andhra-pradesh/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Andhra Pradesh
- [Arunachal Pradesh electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/arunachal-pradesh/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Arunachal Pradesh
- [Assam electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/assam/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Assam

- [Chhattisgarh electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/chhattisgarh/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Chhattisgarh
- [Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/dadra-and-nagar-haveli-and-daman-and-diu/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
- [Delhi electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/delhi/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Delhi
- [Goa electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/goa/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Goa
- [Gujarat electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/gujarat/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Gujarat
- [Haryana electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/haryana/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Haryana

- [Kerala electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/kerala/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Kerala
- [Ladakh electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/ladakh/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Ladakh
- [Madhya Pradesh electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/madhya-pradesh/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Madhya Pradesh
- [Maharashtra electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/maharashtra/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Maharashtra
- [Manipur electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/manipur/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Manipur
- [Meghalaya electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/meghalaya/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Meghalaya
- [Mizoram electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/mizoram/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Mizoram
- [Nagaland electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/nagaland/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Nagaland
- [Odisha electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/odisha/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Odisha
- [Puducherry electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/puducherry/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Puducherry
- [Punjab electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/punjab/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Punjab
- [Rajasthan electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/rajasthan/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Rajasthan
- [Sikkim electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/sikkim/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Sikkim
- [Tamil Nadu electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/tamil-nadu/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Tamil Nadu
- [Telangana electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/telangana/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Telangana
- [Tripura electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/tripura/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Tripura
- [Uttar Pradesh electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/uttar-pradesh/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Uttar Pradesh
- [Uttarakhand electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/uttarakhand/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Uttarakhand
- [West Bengal electricity tariffs](https://www.thediscombill.com/tariffs/west-bengal/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for West Bengal

## Notes

- All amounts are in Indian Rupees (INR). "Units" are kWh.
- FPPA (Fuel and Power Purchase Adjustment) is applied per-unit or as a percentage of energy charges, whichever the state's tariff order specifies.
- Slab calculations are telescopic: each rate applies only to units within its slab.
